topIssues: frame 1: Low contrast on secondary text elements such as 'Revenue / variance', 'V1', and the subtitle 'Report a value without changing anything' against the dark background, which reduces legibility.

frame 2: The orange highlight indicator on the left edge of the 'Net income / variance' row is a sharp vertical bar that sits awkwardly close to the rounded corner of the outer container, creating a minor visual misalignment.
fixSuggestions: Increase the brightness/contrast of the muted gray text elements (labels and subtitles) to meet WCAG AA accessibility standards.
Adjust the left orange highlight bar in frames 2 and 3 to either respect the border-radius of the parent container or be inset slightly so it doesn't clash with the rounded corner.
